description: JetBrains TeamCity edge CVEs — authentication bypass exposing REST admin (CVE-2024-27198) and auth-bypass RCE (CVE-2023-42793). Detection-only endpoint fingerprints.

teamcity_authbypass_2024.description: CVE-2024-27198 — TeamCity authentication bypass in the web component allowing unauthenticated access to authenticated REST endpoints (admin token / user create → RCE). Detection = confirm the TeamCity server + REST surface; the bypass request is operator-supervised.

probes.description: REST /app/rest/server present (200/401 with TeamCity version XML/JSON) confirms the CVE-2024-27198 auth-bypass surface family. Fingerprint only — no bypass path parameter appended.
TeamCity login fingerprint (JetBrains/TeamCity branding, TCSESSIONID) — confirms the affected product.

teamcity_authbypass_rce_2023.description: CVE-2023-42793 — TeamCity authentication bypass reaching the RPC/token endpoint → admin token creation → RCE. Detection = confirm the token RPC endpoint is reachable; no token is created.

probes.description: Reaching the tokens RPC endpoint (401/403 gated vs the CVE-2023-42793 bypass) fingerprints the affected TeamCity REST surface. Endpoint fingerprint only — no token creation performed.
